title: Argentinian Bitter Corn Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring argentinian corn and a crunchy crumble topping, perfect for warm weather.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together argentinian corn and granulated sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together all-purpose flour and cold unsalted butter until crumbly.
Add the flour mixture to the corn mixture and stir until just combined.
Add bitter and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
